description: Migrate from LangChain/LangGraph to Vercel AI SDK - complete removal of all @langchain/* dependencies

userStories.title: Install AI SDK packages and set up Vitest
userStories.description: As a developer, I need AI SDK packages installed alongside LangChain and a testing framework ready so I can begin the incremental migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Install packages: ai, @ai-sdk/google, @ai-sdk/groq, ollama-ai-provider
Install vitest as dev dependency
Add "test": "vitest run" to package.json scripts
Create vitest.config.ts with TypeScript support
Create a sample test file src/utils/__tests__/sample.test.ts that passes
Existing pnpm dev still works with both dependency sets installed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is foundation setup only. Do NOT modify any existing code. Just add new packages and test config.

userStories.title: Create AI SDK model provider layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need AI SDK model instances configured for all 3 providers so migrated components can use them.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/ai-sdk-models.ts with AI SDK provider instances for all current models
Google models: google('gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview'), google('gemini-3-flash-preview'), google('gemini-3.1-pro-preview') from @ai-sdk/google
Groq models: groq('llama-3.3-70b-versatile'), groq('deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b'), groq('deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-32b') from @ai-sdk/groq
Ollama models: ollama('deepseek-r1:14b'), ollama('openthinker:latest') from ollama-ai-provider
Export getAISDKToolsModel() returning first available tool-enabled model
Export getAISDKReasoningModel() returning first available reasoning model
Export individual model references for direct access
Unit test in src/utils/__tests__/ai-sdk-models.test.ts verifies exports exist and functions return model instances
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Mirror the structure of src/utils/ai-models.ts but with AI SDK providers. Do NOT modify the existing ai-models.ts yet. The ModelTracker adaptation will come later. For now, create simple wrapper functions. Use env vars from src/utils/loadEnv.ts for API keys (GEMINI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY).

userStories.title: Migrate string and datetime tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the simplest tools migrated first to establish the AI SDK tool conversion pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert src/tools/strings.ts from LangChain tool() to AI SDK tool() format
Convert src/tools/datetime.ts from LangChain tool() to AI SDK tool() format (if it exists, otherwise skip)
AI SDK tools use 'parameters' instead of 'schema', 'execute' instead of function-first argument
Tools exported as named const objects (e.g., export const stringLengthTool = tool({...}))
Remove all @langchain/core imports from converted files
Unit tests verify each tool produces correct output
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Pattern: LangChain tool(fn, { name, description, schema }) becomes AI SDK tool({ description, inputSchema, execute }). AI SDK v6 uses 'inputSchema' not 'parameters'. AI SDK tools don't have a name property - names are assigned via object keys when passed to generateText. Import tool from 'ai' package.

userStories.title: Migrate math tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need math tools migrated, replacing the LangChain community WolframAlphaTool with a direct API call.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert additionTool, subtractionTool, multiplicationTool, divisionTool in src/tools/math.ts to AI SDK tool() format
Replace WolframAlphaTool from @langchain/community with a direct HTTP fetch to Wolfram Alpha Short Answers API (http://api.wolframalpha.com/v1/result?appid=APPID&i=QUERY)
Export all 5 tools as individual named exports AND as a mathTools record object: { wolfram_alpha: ..., addition: ..., etc }
Remove all @langchain imports from the file
Unit tests verify arithmetic tools return correct results
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: WOLFRAM_ALPHA_APP_ID env var is available via src/utils/loadEnv.ts. The Short Answers API is a simple GET request returning plain text.

userStories.title: Migrate database tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Prisma-based database lookup tools migrated to AI SDK format.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert all 5 tools in src/tools/database.ts to AI SDK tool() format: lookupDocumentById, lookupDocumentByTitle, lookupDocumentArtifactById, lookupDocumentArtifactByDocumentIdTitle, pullFullDocumentReport
Prisma query logic inside execute functions remains unchanged
Export individual tool consts AND a documentTools record object
Remove all @langchain imports from the file
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: These tools access the Prisma client. Check how they currently get the prisma instance - it may be imported globally or passed via closure. Preserve the same access pattern.

userStories.title: Migrate telegram, workflow, and aurora chat tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the remaining simple tools migrated to AI SDK format.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert src/tools/telegram.ts respondToTelegram tool to AI SDK tool() format
Convert src/tools/workflow.ts executeDocumentWorkflow tool to AI SDK tool() format
Convert src/tools/aurora-chat.ts tools (addChatMessage, getLatestChatMessage, triggerAuroraAgent) from DynamicStructuredTool to AI SDK tool() format
Export each file's tools as record objects
Remove all @langchain imports from these 3 files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: DynamicStructuredTool from @langchain/core/tools converts the same way as regular tool(). The aurora-chat tools may use an auroraChatTools array export - convert to record object.

userStories.title: Migrate search tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need search tools migrated, replacing LangChain community wrappers with direct API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace DuckDuckGoSearch from @langchain/community with direct use of duck-duck-scrape package (already a dependency) in src/tools/search.ts
Replace TavilySearchResults with direct HTTP fetch to Tavily REST API (POST https://api.tavily.com/search)
Replace WikipediaQueryRun with direct HTTP fetch to Wikipedia API (https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php)
Convert getPageContent tool wrapper to AI SDK format (Playwright logic unchanged)
Export all search tools as a researchTools record object
Remove all @langchain imports from the file
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: TAVILY_API_KEY env var available via loadEnv. duck-duck-scrape is already in package.json. For Wikipedia, use action=query&format=json&prop=extracts&exintro=true. SERPGoogleScholarAPITool and serpGoogleSearch are already commented out in tools/index.ts - ignore them.

userStories.title: Create direct Qdrant vector store utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a utility replacing @langchain/qdrant with direct @qdrant/js-client-rest calls and AI SDK embeddings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/vector-store.ts with a VectorStore class wrapping @qdrant/js-client-rest
Class methods: similaritySearch(query: string, k: number, filter?): returns array of { pageContent, metadata }
Class methods: addDocuments(docs: { pageContent: string, metadata: Record<string,any> }[]): adds docs with embeddings
Class methods: delete(ids: string[]): deletes points by ID
Embeddings generated via AI SDK embed()/embedMany() using ollama.embedding('nomic-embed-text') from ollama-ai-provider
Export getVectorStore(collectionName: string) factory function returning a configured VectorStore instance
Unit tests verify the class methods (mocked Qdrant client and embed calls)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: QDRANT_URL env var available. Use @qdrant/js-client-rest (already a dependency) for QdrantClient. The embed() function is from the 'ai' package. The ollama.embedding() provider is from ollama-ai-provider. Match the return format of LangChain's QdrantVectorStore.similaritySearch() so downstream tools don't need changes.

userStories.title: Migrate Qdrant search tools to AI SDK
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the 3 vector search tools updated to use the new direct Qdrant utility.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert eoVectorSearch, p2025VectorSearch, researchArtifactVectorSearch in src/tools/qdrant.ts to AI SDK tool() format
Tools use the new getVectorStore() from src/utils/vector-store.ts instead of @langchain/qdrant QdrantVectorStore
Update addDocumentToVectorStore function to use the new VectorStore utility
Export tools as a vectorSearchTools record object
Remove all @langchain imports from src/tools/qdrant.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The existing getVectorStore() in qdrant.ts creates QdrantVectorStore instances with OllamaEmbeddings. Replace with the new getVectorStore() from src/utils/vector-store.ts. Keep the collection names: executive_order_artifacts, p2025, research_artifacts.

userStories.title: Migrate memory tools with closure pattern
userStories.description: As a developer, I need memory tools converted to AI SDK format with userId passed via closures instead of RunnableConfig.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert createManageMemoryTool() in src/tools/memories.ts to return AI SDK tool() instead of LangChain tool()
Convert createSearchMemoryTool() similarly
Add userId parameter to factory functions: createManageMemoryTool(namespace, options, userId)
Replace RunnableConfig-based namespace resolution with closure: use userId parameter directly in getNamespace({user_id: userId})
Update pre-instantiated exports (manageUserPreferencesTool, searchUserPreferencesTool, etc.) - these become factory functions that take userId
Use the new getVectorStore() from src/utils/vector-store.ts
Remove all @langchain imports from the file
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The NamespaceTemplate class can stay as-is. The key change: instead of receiving config?.configurable in the execute function, the userId is captured at tool creation time via closure. Pre-instantiated tool exports (manageUserPreferencesTool etc.) cannot be pre-instantiated anymore since they need userId - convert them to factory functions or remove them and let agents create tools at invocation time.

userStories.title: Update tool index and remove LangGraph store
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the tool index updated to AI SDK format and the LangGraph QdrantStore removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/tools/index.ts to export Record<string, CoreTool> objects instead of arrays
Remove ToolNode, StructuredToolInterface, RunnableToolLike imports from @langchain
Import CoreTool type from 'ai' package
Export mathTools, researchTools, documentTools as record objects
Delete src/agents/store.ts (QdrantStore LangGraph BaseStore implementation)
Delete src/utils/qdrant-store.ts if it exists and is no longer needed
Update all files that import from tools/index.ts to handle the new record format
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CoreTool is the AI SDK type for tools. The record format is { tool_name: tool({...}), another_tool: tool({...}) }. Consumers like agents will spread these records: tools: { ...mathTools, ...researchTools }.

userStories.title: Migrate simple workflow routes batch 1
userStories.description: As a developer, I need simple text-generation workflow routes converted to AI SDK generateText.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert src/routes/workflows/summary.ts: model.invoke() to generateText()
Convert src/routes/workflows/key-points.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/eli5.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/honest-title.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/social-post.ts similarly
Replace SystemMessage/HumanMessage with plain { role, content } objects
Import generateText from 'ai' and models from src/utils/ai-sdk-models.ts
Remove all @langchain imports from these 5 files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Pattern: const result = await reasoningModel.invoke([new SystemMessage('...'), new HumanMessage('...')]) becomes const { text } = await generateText({ model: getAISDKReasoningModel(), system: '...', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: '...' }] }). The result.content.toString() becomes just text.

userStories.title: Migrate complex workflow routes batch 2
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the remaining text-generation workflow routes converted to AI SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert src/routes/workflows/action-plan.ts to use generateText()
Convert src/routes/workflows/resist-letter.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/constitutional-considerations.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/find-updates.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/final-summary.ts similarly
Replace all SystemMessage/HumanMessage with plain { role, content } objects
Remove all @langchain imports from these 5 files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Same conversion pattern as US-012. Some of these may use the planning agent - if so, they depend on US-019 (planning agent migration). If they call createPlanningWorkflow, leave those calls as-is for now and convert only the direct model.invoke() calls.

userStories.title: Migrate agent/structured workflow routes batch 3
userStories.description: As a developer, I need workflow routes that use structured output or inline agents converted.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert src/routes/workflows/score.ts: model.withStructuredOutput(schema).invoke() to generateObject({ model, schema, messages })
Convert src/routes/workflows/format.ts: replace inline createReactAgent with generateText({ tools, maxSteps }), remove MemorySaver
Convert src/routes/workflows/enhance.ts: replace any direct model calls with generateText()
Convert src/routes/workflows/research.ts: replace any direct model calls with generateText()
Import generateText, generateObject from 'ai'
Remove all @langchain imports from these 4 files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: score.ts uses withStructuredOutput - convert to generateObject from 'ai'. format.ts uses createReactAgent with MemorySaver for inline tool use - replace with generateText({ tools: {...}, maxSteps: 10 }). enhance.ts and research.ts may call the planning agent - leave those calls as-is for now.

userStories.title: Migrate reprocessing and remaining workflow files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the reprocessing workflow files and remaining routes converted to AI SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert src/routes/workflows/reprocess/fact-check.ts: model.invoke() to generateText()
Convert src/routes/workflows/reprocess/voice-clarity.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/reprocess/editorial-review.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/reprocess/final-rewrite.ts similarly
Convert src/routes/workflows/reprocess/run-reprocess.ts if it has direct model calls
Convert src/routes/workflows/run-all.ts if it has direct model calls
Convert src/routes/workflows/scrape-new.ts and from-url.ts if they have model calls
Remove all @langchain imports from converted files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reprocess files were recently created and use the pattern: getReasoningModel().getModel().invoke(). Convert to generateText({ model: getAISDKReasoningModel(), ... }). run-reprocess.ts orchestrates the pipeline and may not have direct model calls. scrape-new.ts and from-url.ts may not use LLMs at all - check before modifying.

userStories.title: Build custom checkpoint persistence layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a lightweight PostgreSQL message persistence layer to replace LangGraph's PostgresSaver.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/checkpoint.ts with functions: saveCheckpoint(threadId: string, messages: CoreMessage[]): Promise<void>
Add loadCheckpoint(threadId: string): Promise<CoreMessage[]> function
Add deleteCheckpoint(threadId: string): Promise<void> function
Use existing pg pool connection from the project (same pool used by src/agents/checkpointer.ts)
Create ai_sdk_checkpoints table with columns: thread_id (text, primary key), messages (jsonb), updated_at (timestamptz)
Auto-create table on first use if it doesn't exist (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS)
Unit tests verify save, load, and delete operations with mocked pg pool
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CoreMessage type is from 'ai' package. Use the pg pool pattern from src/agents/checkpointer.ts for the database connection. Do NOT modify existing LangGraph checkpoint tables.

userStories.title: Migrate Research Agent
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Research Agent migrated from createReactAgent to generateText with maxSteps.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite src/agents/research-agent.ts to use generateText() from 'ai' package
Use generateText({ model, system, messages, tools, maxSteps: 15 }) pattern
System prompt preserved from existing implementation
Tool set includes migrated math tools, research tools, and string tools (spread as record objects)
Export a runResearchAgent(prompt: string) async function returning the result text
Remove all @langchain imports
No checkpointing needed (stateless sub-agent)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The research agent is called by the planning agent as a sub-agent. It does not maintain state across invocations. Use getAISDKToolsModel() from src/utils/ai-sdk-models.ts.

userStories.title: Migrate Telegram Agent
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Telegram Agent migrated with custom checkpointing for conversation continuity.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite src/agents/telegram-agent.ts to use generateText() with AI SDK tools and maxSteps: 15
Load previous conversation from checkpoint using loadCheckpoint(threadId) before each invocation
Save updated messages (previous + new user message + assistant response) using saveCheckpoint() after each invocation
threadId derived from userId and date (matching existing pattern)
Memory tools created with userId via closure pattern (createManageMemoryTool and createSearchMemoryTool with userId param)
System prompt / personality prompt preserved via 'system' parameter in generateText()
All existing tool categories available: memory, document, math, research, workflow, telegram
Remove all @langchain imports
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Uses checkpoint.ts from US-016. Memory tools from US-010 now take userId as parameter. Import all tool records and spread them: tools: { ...mathTools, ...researchTools, ...documentTools, manage_memory: createManageMemoryTool(..., userId), ... }.

userStories.title: Migrate Planning Agent
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Planning Agent's 3-node linear StateGraph replaced with sequential function calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite src/agents/planning-agent.ts as a plain async function with 3 sequential generateText() calls
Step 1 createPlan: generateText() with reasoning model to create a plan
Step 2 executeResearch: calls the migrated runResearchAgent() from US-017
Step 3 createOutput: generateText() with reasoning model to synthesize final output
Remove StateGraph, Annotation, START, END imports from @langchain/langgraph
State passed between steps via plain TypeScript variables
Export function returns { plan, research, result } matching current interface used by workflow routes
Remove all @langchain imports
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The planning agent is used by enhance.ts and other workflow routes via createPlanningWorkflow(). Ensure the exported function signature is compatible. System prompts are in src/constants/strings.ts.

userStories.title: Migrate Aurora Agent - orchestrator class
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Aurora Agent's 6-node StateGraph with conditional looping replaced with a custom AuroraOrchestrator class.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite src/agents/aurora-agent.ts as an AuroraOrchestrator class

AuroraState interface preserved with fields: chatHistory, currentPrompt, userId, contextSearchPlan, contextSearchResults, executionPlan, executionResults, finalResponse, contextConfidence, contextSearchAttempts, toolUsage
Implement 6 methods: createContextSearchPlan(), executeContextSearch(), evaluateNeedForMoreContext(), createExecutionPlan(), executePlan(), createFinalResponse()
run() method orchestrates: step 1, then loop steps 2-3 while contextConfidence <= 5 and contextSearchAttempts < 3, then steps 4-6
Each method uses generateText() from 'ai' package
Steps 2 and 5 use generateText({ tools, maxSteps: 25 }) for tool-calling loops
Tool usage tracking via onStepFinish callback in generateText() (replaces wrapToolWithTracking())
Memory tools instantiated with userId via closure at orchestrator creation
Conversation checkpointing via saveCheckpoint/loadCheckpoint from US-016
All existing system prompts preserved for each node
Remove all @langchain imports
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the most complex migration. The existing aurora-agent.ts has ~500 lines. The orchestrator class replaces StateGraph + Annotation + conditional edges. The conditional loop (evaluateNeedForMoreContext checks confidence score 0-9) is now a simple do/while loop. System prompts for each node are defined inline in the existing file - preserve them exactly.

userStories.title: Update Aurora Chat Service integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Aurora Chat Service updated to work with the migrated Aurora Agent.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/services/aurora-chat.ts to invoke AuroraOrchestrator instead of the LangGraph workflow
Convert message format from LangChain HumanMessage/AIMessage/SystemMessage to AI SDK CoreMessage format
PostgreSQL notification listener logic unchanged
Error handling preserved (try/catch with error message insertion to chat)
Remove all @langchain imports from the file
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The service listens for PostgreSQL notifications on aurora-interface_chat_channel, then invokes the Aurora agent. Update the invocation to create an AuroraOrchestrator instance and call run(). CoreMessage uses { role: 'user'|'assistant'|'system', content: string } format.

userStories.title: Remove all LangChain dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all LangChain packages removed after all components are migrated.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove from package.json: @langchain/core, @langchain/community, @langchain/google-genai, @langchain/groq, @langchain/ollama, @langchain/langgraph, @langchain/langgraph-checkpoint, @langchain/langgraph-checkpoint-postgres, @langchain/qdrant, @langchain/textsplitters
Delete src/agents/checkpointer.ts (PostgresSaver wrapper - replaced by checkpoint.ts)
Delete src/utils/ai-models.ts (replaced by ai-sdk-models.ts) and update all imports across codebase
Remove LangSmith env vars (LANGSMITH_API_KEY, LANGSMITH_TRACING, LANGSMITH_ENDPOINT) from .env.example if it exists
Run pnpm install to clean lock file
Verify zero @langchain imports remain (grep -r '@langchain' src/ returns nothing)
pnpm dev starts without errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the final cleanup. All prior stories must be complete. Run grep -r '@langchain' src/ to find any remaining imports. Also check for imports of the old ai-models.ts and update them to ai-sdk-models.ts. Delete src/utils/model-tracker.ts only if it was fully replaced; otherwise update it to remove LangChain types.

userStories.title: End-to-end validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the entire system works correctly after complete migration.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm dev starts without errors
All Vitest tests pass (pnpm test)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
No @langchain imports remain in codebase
Server responds to health check or basic route
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is a validation-only story. Do NOT make code changes unless fixing issues found during validation. Run pnpm dev, pnpm test, npx tsc --noEmit, and grep -r '@langchain' src/. If any fail, fix the issue and document what was wrong.
